title: Jack Dorsey Is Wrong: Pro-Worker AI Is Possible
description: The fear that artificial intelligence will lead to mass layoffs is spreading. Jack Dorsey, the co-founder of the financial technology firm Block, laid off nearly half of its workforce last week. Citing AI’s labor-saving capabilities, he predicted other companies would soon follow suit: “Within the next year, I believe the majority of companies will reach the same conclusion and make similar structural changes.”

title: AI may be creating instead of destroying jobs
description: The increasing use of artificial intelligence by firms may be creating some jobs in the euro zone rather than ⁠destroying them as many fear, a European Central Bank blog post argues today.
content:

title: Rise of AI-fuelled SATANISM: Priests, imams and rabbis are invited to attend an exorcism course in Rome amid fears devil worshippers are using artificial intelligence
description: Priests, imams, and rabbis have been invited to attend a special training programme in Rome to fight what they see as an alarming rise in AI-fuelled satanism.
content:
Back in the 1980s, priests fretted that Satanists were corrupting the world through everything from rock records to Dungeons and Dragons.
But according to the organisers of an exorcism course, in 2026, the devil has adopted far more modern methods.

title: AI's Surprising Impact: Job Creation in the Euro Zone
description: The European Central Bank highlights that artificial intelligence is potentially creating jobs in the euro zone, contradicting fears of job destruction. AI-intensive firms are more likely to hire staff rather than lay them off. Positive future employment growth is expected, despite potential long-term changes.
content:
The European Central Bank has suggested a shift in the narrative surrounding artificial intelligence, arguing that its increasing use in firms may actually be generating employment opportunities in the euro zone.
Contrary to prevailing fears, AI-inte... [470 chars]

title: Watchdog reporter explains AI in the classroom
description: Colleen Wixon reported on the trend of using artificial intelligence in the classroom.
content:
Each of the Treasure Coast school districts have or are in the process of creating districtwide policies and guidelines on how AI is to be used in the classroom.

title: Few Details on Trump’s Plan for Self
description: The president is scheduled to unveil his Ratepayer Protection Pledge as he greenlights data centers to power America’s race for artificial intelligence.

description: In the evolving world of connected television, AI CTV advertising platforms are redefining how brands approach measurable media investment.
